onboarding_title_1: All drug stores in one place
onboarding_desc_1: Browse hundreds of products from multiple stores, compare prices and choose the most suitable for your pharmacy with one click.
onboarding_desc_2: Add products from different stores in one cart, and save your time and effort in managing daily purchases.
onboarding_desc_3: Take advantage of available discount coupons, and track the status of your orders from the moment of confirmation to delivery.
